diagrams.title: Single-Dimensional Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are stored contiguously in memory with indices
diagrams.purpose: Understanding array indexing and memory contiguity

diagrams.title: 2D Array Representation
diagrams.description: Illustrates a 3x3 matrix as an array of arrays
diagrams.purpose: Understanding 2D array structure and row-column relationship

diagrams.title: Jagged Array Structure
diagrams.description: Shows a jagged array with different row lengths
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how jagged arrays store varying row lengths
